ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the timing parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the timing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the timing parameter */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the timing parameter (e.g., RX, TX, etc.) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the timing parameter */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component associated with the timing parameter */,
  "register" TEXT /* Register associated with the timing parameter */,
  "bit_position" INTEGER /* Bit position in the register */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the timing parameter */,
  "constraint" TEXT /* Constraints or assumptions related to the timing parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_component FOREIGN KEY ("component") REFERENCES components ("component_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_register FOREIGN KEY ("register") REFERENCES registers ("register_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a timing parameter */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the timing parameter */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who approved the changes */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_versions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, firmware developer, QA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_parameter_types" (
  "param_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter type */,
  "param_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_parameter_categories" (
  "param_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter category */,
  "param_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing parameter category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing parameter category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_category_id")
)
